name: clawtext
title: ClawText - Comprehensive Memory Platform for OpenClaw
description: Complete knowledge lifecycle system: capture conversational context, ingest multi-source knowledge, learn from operational patterns. Tiered retrieval, automatic curation, operational learning lane with capture/review/promotion.
author: ragesaq
features: Three-lane architecture: working memory, knowledge ingest, operational learning
Hot memory cache (300 items, <1ms retrieval, JSON-backed, self-warming)
Token budget handling with graceful degradation
Operational learning: capture failures, detect patterns, review with agents, promote guidance
Multi-source ingest: repos, docs, forums, JSON, text (bundled engine)
CLI for agent workflows (memory, ingest, operational commands)
BM25 hybrid search with project weighting
Scheduled maintenance: review digests, candidate backlog, health checks

changelog.1.4.0: Bundled ingest engine, operational learning lane (capture/review/promotion/maintenance), three-lane architecture complete
changelog.1.3.0: Hot cache optimization, BM25 scoring, plugin activation + allowlist
changelog.1.2.0: Tiered memory (L1-L4), cluster rebuild, validate-rag tooling
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — basic memory injection + retrieval
